name: Possible GootKit WScript Execution
description: GootKit banking trojan’s WScript execution activity is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Possible GootKit WScript Execution'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WinServer event_id=4688 "process"="*\wscript.exe" command="*\APPDATA\*.js*"`.
